name: AREthGetData
title: AREthGetData
syntax: dword AREthGetData( dword messageHandle, dword bufferLength, char buffer[] );
description: This function can be used to query the raw data of a SOME/IP message.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message (see OnAREthMessage)

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the AREthGetLastError function.
